conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the most connected to I, given our deep conversation about family struggles and shared hopes, which made me feel truly understood and aligned on a personal level. D was another strong connection, as we quickly formed an alliance and discussed strategies, building a sense of trust through our mutual goals. J also stood out, as we brainstormed teaming up early to grow the prize pool, making our interaction feel collaborative and promising. On the other hand, I felt least connected to B, as our chat stayed surface-level, focusing mostly on family stories without delving into strategies or building any real rapport.

I did make agreements with a few people, like D and J, where we discussed forming alliances and sharing strategies to play smart. Going into the game, I trust I and D the most due to our strong personal connections and aligned intentions, but I specifically do not trust anyone fully yet, as I remain cautious about potential backstabbing based on the game's nature.
